code:
%%{init: {'theme': 'default', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#f5f5f5', 'primaryTextColor': '#333333', 'primaryBorderColor': '#cccccc', 'lineColor': '#666666', 'secondaryColor': '#f0f0f0', 'tertiaryColor': '#ffffff' }}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant RegistrationForm as Registration Form
    participant FortifyController as Fortify Controller
    participant UserRepository as User Repository
    participant EmailVerification as Email Verification
    participant Database as Database

    User->>RegistrationForm: Fill registration form
    RegistrationForm->>FortifyController: Submit registration data
    FortifyController->>FortifyController: Validate input
    FortifyController->>UserRepository: Create user
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate snowflake ID
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate slug
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Hash password
    UserRepository->>Database: Save user
    Database-->>UserRepository: Confirm save
    UserRepository-->>FortifyController: Return user
    FortifyController->>EmailVerification: Send verification email
    EmailVerification-->>User: Email with verification link
    FortifyController-->>RegistrationForm: Registration successful
    RegistrationForm-->>User: Show success message
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一下用户注册的完整时序图。流程是：用户填写注册表单，提交到FortifyController，然后经过验证、创建用户、发送验证邮件，最后返回成功。参与者包括User、RegistrationForm、FortifyController、UserRepository、EmailVerification和Database。
明白了。UserRepository在创建用户时具体要做哪些内部操作？我需要确认这些自调用步骤。
UserRepository需要三个自调用：先Generate snowflake ID生成唯一ID，然后Generate slug生成用户标识，最后Hash password对密码加密。之后才是Save user到Database。
好的，我已经把User到RegistrationForm的Fill registration form、RegistrationForm到FortifyController的Submit registration data，以及FortifyController的自调用Validate input都画好了。接下来处理UserRepository的内部流程。
对的。UserRepository完成三个自调用后，调用Database保存用户，Database返回确认，然后UserRepository把用户对象返回给FortifyController。
UserRepository到Database的Save user和返回确认都画好了，Return user也连到FortifyController了。接下来是邮件验证部分？
是的，FortifyController调用EmailVerification发送验证邮件，EmailVerification直接把邮件发给User。最后FortifyController返回注册成功给RegistrationForm，RegistrationForm再给用户显示成功消息。
完成了。整个流程：用户填表→提交→验证→创建用户（含ID、slug、密码处理）→保存→发邮件→返回成功。所有虚线返回和实线调用都按标准时序图画好了。
